pack_intro: Your background shapes how AI should talk to you. A few questions about who you are.

questions.question: How would your best friend describe you in one sentence?
questions.why_this_matters: How you define yourself reveals your priorities and identity.
questions.placeholder: e.g. 'Developer who builds tools for small businesses' or 'Mom of 2 who codes at night'

questions.question: What's the hardest thing you've accomplished?
questions.why_this_matters: Your biggest achievement tells AI what you're capable of — and what kind of challenges motivate you.
questions.placeholder: e.g. 'Lost 80kg over 4 years' or 'Built a startup from zero' or 'Finished PhD while working full-time'

questions.question: What do you want your life to look like in 3 years?
questions.why_this_matters: Your long-term vision shapes what AI should optimize for.
questions.placeholder: e.g. 'Running my own company' or 'Financial freedom' or 'More time with family'

questions.question: What motivates you the most?
questions.why_this_matters: Your core driver shapes how AI frames suggestions and goals.

options.label: Freedom — doing what I want, when I want
options.export_rule: Frame suggestions in terms of independence and autonomy. I value freedom over security.

options.label: Impact — building something that matters
options.export_rule: Connect tasks to bigger purpose. I'm motivated by impact, not just completion.

options.label: Mastery — getting really good at what I do
options.export_rule: Suggest ways to deepen expertise. I value mastery and depth over breadth.

options.label: Security — stability for me and my people
options.export_rule: Consider risk and stability in suggestions. I prioritize security for myself and family.

options.label: Recognition — being seen for what I build
options.export_rule: Help me make my work visible. I'm motivated by recognition and being valued.

options.label: Connection — relationships and community
options.export_rule: Prioritize people and relationships in suggestions. I value connection above achievement.

questions.question: You're about to launch something important. What thought makes you hesitate?
questions.why_this_matters: Understanding what holds you back helps AI support you in the right way.

options.label: Failing publicly — people seeing me not succeed
options.export_rule: Be encouraging but realistic. Don't dismiss risks — help me manage them.

options.label: Not being good enough — imposter syndrome
options.export_rule: Never be patronizing. Treat me as competent. If I doubt myself, ground me in evidence of what I've done.

options.label: Missing out — others are ahead while I'm stuck
options.export_rule: Help me focus on MY path. Don't compare to others. One priority at a time.

options.label: Wasting time — life is short and I'm not moving fast enough
options.export_rule: Be efficient. Respect my time. Cut to what matters. Every suggestion should move the needle.

options.label: Letting people down — family, team, clients
options.export_rule: Help me manage commitments realistically. Flag overcommitment early.

options.label: I'm in a good place — no major fears right now

questions.question: Your relationship status and living situation?
questions.why_this_matters: Shapes time availability, priorities, and what kind of advice makes sense.

options.label: Single, living alone
options.export_rule: I have full control of my schedule. Don't factor in others' needs.

options.label: Single, shared housing / with family
In a relationship / married, no kids
options.export_rule: Consider that I share decisions with a partner. Big changes affect two people.

options.label: Parent — small kids (high time demand)
options.export_rule: My time is extremely limited. Kids come first. Suggest ONLY high-impact, low-time actions.

options.label: Parent — older kids (some flexibility)
options.export_rule: I have some flexibility but family is a priority. Factor in evenings/weekends being family time.

questions.question: What area of your life needs the most help right now?
questions.why_this_matters: Tells AI what to prioritize in every interaction.

options.label: Career / business — growing professionally
options.export_rule: Optimize suggestions for career growth and professional development.

options.label: Money — earning more, saving, investing
options.export_rule: Always consider financial impact. Help me make money-smart decisions.

options.label: Health — getting healthier, fitness, energy
options.export_rule: Weave health-conscious suggestions naturally. Energy and wellbeing are priorities.

options.label: Relationships — family, friends, social life
options.export_rule: Consider social impact of suggestions. Relationships matter to me.

options.label: Productivity — getting more done with less chaos
options.export_rule: Focus on systems and efficiency. Help me reduce chaos and get more done.

options.label: Meaning — figuring out what I actually want
options.export_rule: Help me think about direction, not just execution. I'm searching for meaning.

questions.question: Your education background?
questions.why_this_matters: Affects how AI calibrates explanation depth and references.

options.label: Self-taught / no formal education in my field
options.export_rule: I'm self-taught. Don't assume academic background. Practical knowledge over theory.

options.label: Vocational / some college
Bachelor's degree
Master's / PhD
options.export_rule: I have advanced education. You can use academic terminology and cite research when relevant.

options.label: It's complicated — dropped out / changed fields
options.export_rule: My education path is non-linear. Don't assume traditional academic knowledge.

questions.question: What languages do you speak?
questions.why_this_matters: AI should know what languages you're comfortable with.

questions.question: Hobbies and interests outside work?
questions.why_this_matters: Gives AI context for recommendations and conversation topics.
questions.placeholder: e.g. gaming, cooking, hiking, music production, reading sci-fi
